subject: Apr 5th, 2026
fact: The session takes place on April 5th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Apr 5th, 2026

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The party slips away from a dinner table at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: dinner table of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is one of the three parties in a confrontation at the dinner table.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had so carefully engineered between Vraxen, Veperyd, and the High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is one of the three parties in a confrontation at the dinner table.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had so carefully engineered between Vraxen, Veperyd, and the High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is the High Inquisitor involved in the confrontation at the dinner table.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had so carefully engineered between Vraxen, Veperyd, and the High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas notes with unease that their imp guide has vanished.
source_quote: Akritas noted with unease that their imp guide had vanished somewhere in the commotion

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur works the lift mechanism with practiced ease.
source_quote: Felkur wasted no time at the lift access, his expert hands working the mechanism with such practiced ease

subject: stolen key
fact: The party ascended the tower with the stolen key in hand.
source_quote: ascended the tower with the stolen key in hand

subject: Abyssal 23
fact: Felkur mocks the archaic Abyssal 23 operating system controlling the lift.
source_quote: mock the archaic 'Abyssal 23' operating system controlling it

subject: upper corridor
fact: The upper corridor has a floor covered in a series of tiles.
source_quote: upper corridor greeted them with an unsettling stillness, its floor covered in a series of tiles

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: A Glyph of Warding was located on the second tile of the corridor.
source_quote: his fingers grazed the second tile—a Glyph of Warding that would have detonated in his face

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim calls upon a powerful enchantment to strip away magical concealment.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a powerful enchantment that stripped away all magical concealment

subject: trap detection
fact: Bramgrim reveals that every tile corresponding to a prime number is a trap.
source_quote: every tile corresponding to a prime number was a trap waiting to be sprung

subject: stone golem
fact: A stone golem stands before the vault door, silent and immovable.
source_quote: Standing before that door, however, was a stone golem—silent, immovable, and utterly indifferent to reason or argument

subject: Vraxen
fact: The stone golem is keyed to recognize Vraxen by scent alone.
source_quote: the construct had been keyed to recognize Vraxen by scent alone

subject: scent-extraction device
fact: Felkur produces a small gadget for extracting unwanted flavors.
source_quote: Felkur reached into his pack and produced a small, peculiar gadget

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear had been bouncing on Vraxen's table and picked up the arcanaloth's scent.
source_quote: the Owlbear had been bouncing on Vraxen's table not long ago and had picked up the arcanaloth's scent

subject: golem bypass
fact: Felkur applies the extracted scent and the stone golem steps aside.
source_quote: Felkur extracted it, applied it, and the stone golem stepped silently aside

subject: vault door
fact: Beyond the golem lies a reinforced Mithril door with three distinct locking mechanisms.
source_quote: Beyond the golem lay a reinforced Mithril door with three distinct locking mechanisms

subject: temperature-controlled chamber
fact: The room beyond the door is kept at a constant chill.
source_quote: temperature-controlled chamber kept at a constant chill

subject: soul coins
fact: The vault walls are lined with soul coins.
source_quote: walls lined floor to ceiling with shelves bearing soul coins

subject: infernal ledgers
fact: The vault walls are lined with infernal ledgers.
source_quote: walls lined floor to ceiling with shelves bearing soul coins, infernal ledgers

subject: contracts
fact: The vault walls are lined with contracts written in the language of devils.
source_quote: shelves bearing soul coins, infernal ledgers, and contracts written in the language of devils

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rests on a pedestal beneath a crystal dome.
source_quote: At the center of the room, resting on a pedestal beneath a crystal dome, was the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devil hide.
source_quote: a massive tome bound in devil hide

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths has pages made from processed souls that glow with an eerie inner light.
source_quote: its pages made from processed souls that glowed with an eerie inner light

subject: automatic update
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically updates itself with every infernal contract struck in Maerimydra.
source_quote: automatically updating itself with every infernal contract struck in Maerimydra

subject: trap confirmation
fact: Bramgrim confirms through enchanted sight that the room holds no further traps.
source_quote: Bramgrim confirmed through his enchanted sight that the room held no further traps

subject: Felkur Oldenwood
fact: Transaction 44781 records that Felkur Oldenwood was intoxicated with a blood alcohol content of 0.18%.
source_quote: one Felkur Oldenwood—intoxicated, identification verified, blood alcohol content noted at a remarkable 0.18%

subject: Transaction 44781
fact: Felkur sold a priceless artifact to a fence named Limping Oric for forty-five gold pieces.
source_quote: sold a priceless artifact to a fence named Limping Oric for the sum of forty-five gold pieces

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric is a fence who bought the artifact from Felkur.
source_quote: sold a priceless artifact to a fence named Limping Oric

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The artifact in question was the Watcher's Eye Brooch belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak.
source_quote: The artifact in question was the Watcher's Eye Brooch belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak

subject: Brotherhood of the Cloak
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch belongs to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak.
source_quote: Belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak

subject: divination activation
fact: Felkur triggered an ability in the brooch that made its bearer impossible to locate through divination magic.
source_quote: triggering an ability that made its bearer impossible to locate through any form of divination magic

subject: Phantom Ghost
fact: The shadowy figure responsible for the theft became known in Mulmaster as the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: the shadowy figure responsible had become known in Mulmaster as the Phantom Ghost

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party.
source_quote: Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party

subject: name alteration
fact: Felkur replaces his own name in the Lexicon with that of Veris of Mulmaster.
source_quote: replacing his own name with that of Veris of Mulmaster

subject: Mulmaster
fact: Veris of Mulmaster is from a city in Faerûn on the Moonsea.
source_quote: Veris of Mulmaster, a city in Faerûn on the Moonsea

subject: Shard of Crysalized Faerzess
fact: Felkur pockets the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess, a large pure crystal on the vault shelf.
source_quote: Felkur first pocketed the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess—a large, pure crystal sitting on the vault shelf

subject: blame shifting
fact: Felkur adds a forged entry attributing the theft of the Shard to the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: He added a forged entry attributing the theft of the Shard to the Phantom Ghost

subject: hidden door
fact: Felkur located a hidden door in the vault wall.
source_quote: Felkur located a hidden door in the vault wall

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning peak
fact: The party emerges at the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning through the hidden door.
source_quote: emerging at the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: teleportation circle
fact: A twenty-foot diameter teleportation circle pulses at the center of the peak chamber.
source_quote: At the center of the room pulsed a twenty-foot diameter teleportation circle

subject: teleportation circle connection
fact: The teleportation circle connects to five predetermined locations deep in the Underdark.
source_quote: connected to five predetermined locations deep in the Underdark

subject: Fae crystals
fact: Felkur recalibrates the circle using the Fae crystals the party had collected.
source_quote: Felkur immediately set to work recalibrating it using the Fae crystals the party had collected

subject: Daein
fact: Daein plants himself against the iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear planted themselves against it

subject: door breach
fact: Veris commands the golem to tear the door from its hinges.
source_quote: Veris commanded it to tear the door from its hinges entirely

subject: door breach
fact: The door is torn from its hinges, sending splinters of iron flying across the chamber.
source_quote: sending splinters of iron flying across the chamber

subject: Daein
fact: Daein throws himself at the golem in an attempt to shove it back.
source_quote: Daein threw himself at the golem in an attempt to shove it back through the opening

subject: Owlbear attack
fact: The Owlbear launches itself at the golem with its enchanted claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear, undeterred, launched itself at the golem with its enchanted claws

subject: Bramgrim ward
fact: Bramgrim calls upon a powerful ward causing spectral guardians to erupt into being.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a powerful ward, and spectral guardians erupted into being around him

subject: Felkur invisibility
fact: Felkur is rendered invisible by Daein's magic.
source_quote: Felkur, rendered invisible by Daein's magic

subject: Felkur cannon blast
fact: Felkur deploys his eldritch cannon and sends a blast of fire into the golem.
source_quote: deployed his eldritch cannon and sent a blast of fire roaring into the golem

subject: Akritas hunter's mark
fact: Akritas marks the construct with a hunter's mark.
source_quote: Akritas marked the construct with a hunter's mark

subject: Akritas arrow shot
fact: Akritas puts an arrow into the golem with practiced precision.
source_quote: put an arrow into it with practiced precision

subject: portal stabilization
fact: Felkur installs the shattered nodes and rewires the Fae crystals into the portal mechanism.
source_quote: managed to install the shattered nodes and rewire the Fae crystals into the portal mechanism

subject: Veris teleportation
fact: Veris teleports past the frontline and materializes inside the chamber.
source_quote: Veris, growing increasingly desperate and furious, teleported past the frontline entirely and materialized inside the chamber

subject: Veris
fact: Veris bears wounds from the three-way battle below.
source_quote: bearing wounds from the three-way battle below

subject: Varexis
fact: Varexis is mentioned as one of the hosts distracted by the confrontation.
source_quote: hosts—Vraxen, Veperyd, and Varexis

subject: Vraxen's personal journal
fact: The party finds Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: blank devil-binding contracts
fact: The party finds blank devil-binding contracts in the vault.
source_quote: blank devil-binding contracts

subject: Twin Moons of Winter Deep
fact: Transaction 44781 occurred on a night during the Twin Moons of Winter Deep.
source_quote: on a night during the Twin Moons of Winter Deep

subject: Moonsea
fact: Mulmaster is a city in Faerûn on the Moonsea.
source_quote: Veris of Mulmaster, a city in Faerûn on the Moonsea

subject: Yugoloth
fact: Vraxen plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: high investigators executed
fact: High investigators had been executed for their failure to produce answers regarding the theft.
source_quote: High investigators had been executed for their failure to produce answers

subject: shards of iron
fact: Splinters of iron fly across the chamber when the door is torn down.
source_quote: sending splinters of iron flying across the chamber

subject: Veris revenge vow
fact: Veris screams that he would have Felkur's head and have his revenge.
source_quote: screaming that he would not be framed, that he would have Felkur's head, and that he would have his revenge

subject: poisonous clouds
fact: The sky above the peak offers nothing but poisonous clouds that make flight a death sentence.
source_quote: the sky above offered nothing but poisonous clouds that made flight a death sentence

subject: silver inlay
fact: The teleportation circle has silver inlay glowing with a sickly green light.
source_quote: its silver inlay glowing with a sickly green light

subject: portal flickering
fact: The teleportation circle's green light flickers toward something new as Felkur works.
source_quote: its green light flickering toward something new—a way out

subject: Phantom Ghost legend
fact: The party realizes the Phantom Ghost is a legendary, untraceable ghost of a criminal.
source_quote: a legendary, untraceable ghost of a criminal

subject: craftsman
fact: A craftsman left the Watcher's Eye Brooch carelessly on a workbench.
source_quote: left carelessly on a workbench by a craftsman

subject: devils
fact: Contracts in the vault are written in the language of devils.
source_quote: contracts written in the language of devils

subject: crystal dome
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rests beneath a crystal dome.
source_quote: resting on a pedestal beneath a crystal dome

subject: pedestal
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rests on a central pedestal.
source_quote: resting on a pedestal beneath a crystal dome

subject: shelves
fact: The vault walls are lined floor to ceiling with shelves.
source_quote: walls lined floor to ceiling with shelves

subject: elevator approach
fact: The party hears the elevator approaching, signaling someone is coming.
source_quote: The party hears the elevator approaching, signaling that someone is coming

subject: soulcoin ledger
fact: The party searches the vault and finds a soulcoin ledger.
source_quote: The party searches the vault and finds a soulcoin ledger

subject: name scrambling decision
fact: Felkur decides to scramble his entry rather than ripping the page out.
source_quote: Felkur decides to scramble his entry in the Lexicon of Oaths rather than ripping the page out

subject: name change success
fact: Felkur successfully changes the seller's name in the contract to Veris of Mulmaster.
source_quote: Felkur successfully changes the seller's name in the contract from his own to that of Veris of Mulmaster

subject: forged entry creation
fact: Felkur creates a forged entry attributing the theft to the Phantom Ghosts.
source_quote: Felkur creates a forged entry in the ledger attributing the theft of the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess to the 'Phantom Ghosts'

subject: battle duration
fact: Six more agonizing rounds stand between the party and their escape.
source_quote: six more agonizing rounds standing between the party and their escape
